_meta.purpose: auto_discovery 영구 백그라운드 + growth_registry KPI 자동 업데이트

kpi_sources.atlas_nodes: hexa run shared/n6/atlas_health.hexa → parse "unique nodes:" (fallback: grep -c ^@X)

notes: @hexa-first-exempt: hexa stage1 runtime lacks sqlite3/json multi-MB + subprocess parsing reliability. Same exemption pattern as auto_discovery_expand.py and discovery_stream.py.
atomic write: tempfile in same dir → fsync → os.replace(). Previous project blocks (TECS-L, n6-architecture) preserved on merge.
launchd bundles BOTH auto_discovery_expand.py and growth_kpi_update.py --once per 14400s (4h) tick.
NOT launchctl loaded per user hard rule — plist validated only (plutil -lint OK).
lens_count=1576 reflects actual len(lenses[]), not the cosmetic total=1580 field in registry header.
